entries.name: core.no_cross_tenant_artifact_resolution
entries.description: Prohibits cross-tenant references during artifact resolution and evaluation; violations must reject.

entries.name: core.no_execution_without_ledger_authorization
entries.description: Execution commit must bind to a valid ledger authorization for the action; otherwise reject.

entries.name: core.deterministic_pec_outputs
entries.description: PEC outputs must be deterministic for identical PEC input + registry + policy module version.

entries.name: core.ledger_append_only
entries.description: Ledger behavior must be append-only and preserve ordering; tampering must be detectable.

entries.name: core.cosign_token_binding
entries.description: Cosign tokens must bind to tenant_id and action_id and must be signed and unexpired.

entries.name: core.idempotency_integrity
entries.description: Idempotency keys must not be reused with differing payloads.
